title: UPI OC No 234 FY 2026 27 Safeguarding User Information in UPI
text:
ALWAYS
FORWPRD

Nec

NATIONAL PAYMENTS ios eee OF neat

NPCI/UPI/OC-234/2026-27 5™ June 2026

To
All UPI Member Banks and UPI Apps,

Subject: Safeguarding User Information in UPI

Unified Payments Interface (UPI) facilitates instant digital payments by enabling transactions
through a unique UPI ID assigned to each user. UP! Member Banks and UPI Apps providing
customer interface for UPI are responsible under the extant applicable laws to ensure user

privacy.

Accordingly, amongst other measures adopted by UPI Member Banks and UPI Apps to ensure
user privacy, user’s information namely UPI IDs, mobile numbers, and account numbers, must
be masked across all customer-facing interfaces and communications of the UP! Member
Banks and UPI Apps (masking format appended). Additionally, UP! Apps must allow users to
have non-mobile number-based UPI IDs (as per the defined guidelines) and set it as their
default UPI ID.

All UPI Member Banks and UPI Apps must implement the necessary changes on customer

facing interfaces and communications by 4° September 2026.

Yours Sincerely,

SD/-
Sourabh Tomar
Deputy Chief — UPI Product

Annexure

Masking format:

a) UPIID containing Mobile Number: Last 4 digits visible; rest masked. E.g.,
were 557 6 @psphandle

b) Mobile Number: Last 4 digits visible; rest masked. E.g., *******5576

c) Account Number: Last 4 digits visible; rest masked. E.g., *********7787
